sync_mode.description: full_replace = replace all chunks for this collection+version. lifecycle_patch = update state of chunks matching final_doc_id.

doc_id.description: Required for lifecycle_patch. Ignored for full_replace.

lifecycle_state.description: Required for lifecycle_patch. New state to apply to matching chunks.

available_int.description: Optional override for lifecycle_patch. Defaults to 0 for ARCHIVED/RETRACTED, 1 for PUBLISHED.

chunks.description: Required for full_replace. Complete chunk set to store for this collection+version.

tenant_id.description: Tenant identifier for index_versions and published_documents upsert.

opensearch_index.description: OpenSearch index name for index_versions upsert.

qdrant_collection.description: Qdrant collection name for index_versions upsert.

embedding_model.description: Embedding model identifier for index_versions upsert.

chunk_profile_id.description: Chunk profile identifier for index_versions upsert.

index_profile_id.description: Index profile identifier for index_versions upsert.

schema_version.description: Schema version for index_versions upsert. Defaults to v1.

published_document_state.description: Published document state for published_documents upsert. Defaults to PUBLISHED.
